verdict: 2026-07-04 07:30:38 PDT — I would satisfy the ACs with the same small shape: mock-gate only the RoleBar name input, keep presenter identity flowing from `self.displayName`, add a pure `saveToListTarget(participant, config)` helper that reuses the existing matching indexes/normalization for explicit saved-list membership, and wire the UI to existing `addRule` + `clearOverride` without a new store action or dependency. After reading the full changed files and package manifests, this branch follows that shape and stays inside the approved scope. I found no high-leverage approach concerns. Verification note: I attempted the focused Vitest run, but the read-only sandbox blocked Vite from writing `client/node_modules/.vite-temp`; that is environmental, not a design finding.
